ratings.notes: proposed_contextual_controlled<TAB>4<TAB>3<TAB>5<TAB>4<TAB>The response is contextually relevant, aligns with the persona of a smuggler who would want to assist in gaining access but requires clear action. baseline_no_context<TAB>3<TAB>4<TAB>4<TAB>4<TAB>The response is contextually relevant, aligning with the persona of a smuggler who would prefer trade over access due to suspicion and security concerns at the archive. It's natural but could be more direct in offering help directly
